MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Nov-08-2017 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On May-08-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Defendant City And County Of San Francisco'S Motion To Enforce Defendant'S Deposition Subpoena For Elyse Duckett
Off Calendar Nov-03-2017 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Trevor Koski, Esq., Deputy City Attorney, Tel. 415.554.4223, for defendant and moving party;
No other appearance.

RULING: Counsel for defendant represented to the Court that the case has settled. Therefore, the Court VACATED its tentative ruling and DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S Motion To Enforce Defendant's Deposition Subpoena For Elyse Duckett is ordered OFF CALENDAR.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: G. Gonzales; Court Reporter: Reyes F. Hunter, CSR #6576, email:rhunter@sftc.org.

Defendant'S Motion For Summary Judgment (Added For Purposes Of Entering Tentative Ruling)
Off Calendar Oct-13-2017 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
Defendant's Motion For Summary Judgment (Added For Purposes Of Entering Tentative Ruling) is off calendar as a duplicate entry. (302)

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or In The Alternative Summary Adjudication
Off Calendar Oct-13-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Trevor Koski, Esq., Deputy City Attorney, Tel. 415.554.4223, for defendant and moving party;
Eduardo G. Roy, Esq. of Prometheus Partners, Tel. 415.527.0255, for plaintiff and opposing party.

DISCLOSURE: In the middle of argument, the Court disclosed that he knows Chief Hayes-White as their sons played on the same baseball team for a few years but that does not affect his ability to be fair and impartial. No questions were asked or objections raised.

RULING: The matter was argued. After arugments, the Court adopted its tentative ruling on DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or, In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication, with modifications as stated on the record. [See the court's tentative ruling.] Moving party shall prepare a proposed order that conforms with the Court's ruling and in compliance with CCP 437c(g) and CRC 3.1312. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Reporter: Reyes Hunter CSR #6576 email: rhunter@sftc.org. (302)
